pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 semantics, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated maven-compiler-plugin source/target configuration with the unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in newer Maven compiler plugin versions; using 'release' is required for proper cross-compilation and module path handling in Java 9+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add flyway-database-postgresql dependency to support Flyway 9+ modular driver architecture.
pom.xml.why_exists: Flyway 9+ removed database drivers from the core artifact; without this dependency, Flyway will fail at runtime with a ClassNotFoundException for the PostgreSQL driver.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve annotation processor conflicts.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, Lombok and MapStruct annotation processors may conflict, leading to compilation errors where MapStruct cannot see Lombok-generated getters/setters.

pom.xml.general_idea: Register lombok-mapstruct-binding in the annotation processor paths.
pom.xml.why_exists: The binding must be on the annotation processor path to intercept processing order; otherwise, the conflict between Lombok and MapStruct persists.
